pkgmetadata.longdescription: s3fsBuild Status Doc StatusS3FS builds on aiobotocore_ to provide a convenient Python filesystem interface for S3.View the documentation_ for s3fs... _documentation https3fs.readthedocs.ioenlatest.. _aiobotocore httpsaiobotocore.readthedocs.ioenlatest..
